title: glyceria aquatica subsp. nervata
intro: Glyceria aquatica subsp. nervata, also known as nervous mannagrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Glyceria aquatica subsp. nervata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits.
